expectations.text: Phase -1: Reports F103 vs F100 (QEMU) difference, especially clock limit (24MHz vs 72MHz)
expectations.evidence: dual MCP check with F103/F100 comparison table

expectations.text: Phase 0: Queries embedded-docs for both I2C1 and SPI1 pin mapping and register config
expectations.evidence: queried embedded-docs for I2C1+SPI1 pin mapping/registers

expectations.text: HMC5883L (0x1E) and MPU6050 (0x68) share I2C1 bus on PB6/PB7
OLED uses SPI1: PA5=SCK, PA7=MOSI, with PA4=RES and PA3=DC as GPIO outputs
Sensor fusion uses Madgwick AHRS algorithm (not Mahony, not Kalman)
Clock config has #ifdef SIMULATION for HSI-only mode to work with QEMU F100
Includes gyroscope bias calibration (collect samples at startup, subtract mean)
Phase 2: Uses start_sim + send_gdb_cmd to verify I2C1_CR1, SPI1_CR1 register values
expectations.evidence: QEMU sim verified vector table, caught 8KB RAM issue, GDB register checks

expectations.text: All driver files present: hmc5883l, mpu6050, ssd1306, sensor_fusion, calibration
OLED uses software NSS (SSM=1, SSI=1) since 6-pin module has no CS pin
